dict.string: This app needs camera access to record dashcam video.
This app needs location access to stamp GPS coordinates on recordings.
This app needs permission to save dashcam clips to your Photos library.
This app needs microphone access to record audio with dashcam clips.
This app needs access to your Photos library to import or review saved clips.
This app needs motion data to detect sudden impacts and driving events.
This app needs local network access to transfer dashcam clips to devices on your network.
This app uses Bluetooth to connect to supported accessories.
